mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (trader_id, base_asset_id, quote_asset_id, side, price, total_qty, filled_qty, status) VALUES (#{traderId}, #{baseAssetId}, #{quoteAssetId}, #{side}, #{price}, #{totalQty}, #{filledQty}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, trader_id, base_asset_id, quote_asset_id, side, price, total_qty, filled_qty, status, created_at FROM orders WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT id, trader_id, base_asset_id, quote_asset_id, side, price, total_qty, filled_qty, status, created_at FROM orders WHERE base_asset_id = #{baseAssetId} AND quote_asset_id = #{quoteAssetId} AND side = #{side} AND status IN (0, 1) -- 0: 新訂單, 1: 部分成交 AND
price >= #{price} ORDER BY price DESC, created_at ASC
price <= #{price} ORDER BY price ASC, created_at ASC
FOR UPDATE -- 加鎖！避免同一張單子被多個成交情境重複吃掉
